summary: Completed frontend testing of Hebrew wellness app MVP with category selection, task cards, timer functionality, and navigation

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay blocks navigation button clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: force=True clicks work but indicate z-index/overlay issue

passed_tests: Hebrew RTL layout displays correctly (direction: rtl)
Category buttons (גוף, רגש, מחשבה) display Hebrew labels correctly
Category selection shows random task cards with Hebrew titles
Task cards display duration in Hebrew ('X דקות')
Timer activation and countdown functionality working
Circular progress bar animates during timer
Timer displays time in MM:SS format correctly
Back button during timer shows confirmation dialog
Back button returns to category selection after confirmation
Profile page loads with Hebrew title 'הפרופיל שלי'
Profile page shows statistics (0 completed, 0 minutes initially)
Category breakdown displays all three categories with counts
success_percentage: frontend: 75% - Core functionality works, navigation issues present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation overlay issue - Emergent badge is blocking bottom navigation clicks. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning of the badge element to prevent interference with user interactions.
